name: keyraycast
title: KeyRaycast
description: Show keystrokes on screen — a modern KeyCastr alternative as a Raycast extension
author: benostein

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Keystroke Overlay
commands.subtitle: KeyRaycast
commands.description: Start or stop the keystroke overlay. Toggle off then on to apply settings changes.

preferences.name: appearance
preferences.title: Appearance
preferences.description: Color theme for the overlay pills

preferences.name: position
preferences.title: Position
preferences.description: Where to show the overlay on screen

preferences.name: uppercaseKeys
preferences.title: Advanced
preferences.description: Show all typed characters in uppercase. When off, typing shows as-is (hello not HELLO). Shortcuts like ⌘S are always uppercase.
preferences.label: Force Uppercase

preferences.name: showSpaceSymbol
preferences.description: Show ␣ symbol for space key instead of a blank space
preferences.label: Show Space Symbol

preferences.name: showMouseClicks
preferences.description: Show modifier+clicks and right-clicks in the overlay
preferences.label: Show Mouse Clicks

scripts.prebuild: npm run build-helper-universal && test -f assets/KeyraycastHelper && shasum -a 256 assets/KeyraycastHelper > assets/KeyraycastHelper.sha256 && shasum -a 256 -c assets/KeyraycastHelper.sha256
scripts.build-helper: cd swift/keyraycast-helper && swift build -c release --scratch-path ../../.raycast-swift-build/keyraycast-helper && cp ../../.raycast-swift-build/keyraycast-helper/release/KeyraycastHelper ../../assets/KeyraycastHelper
scripts.build-helper-universal: cd swift/keyraycast-helper && swift build -c release --arch arm64 --arch x86_64 --scratch-path ../../.raycast-swift-build/keyraycast-helper && cp ../../.raycast-swift-build/keyraycast-helper/apple/Products/Release/KeyraycastHelper ../../assets/KeyraycastHelper
